title: tephrosia oligophylla
intro: Tephrosia oligophylla, also known as the Bush Veldt Grape or Bush Veldt, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the pea family, Fabaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Tephrosia oligophylla include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce cholesterol levels, and exhibit immunomodulatory and antitumor activities. Herbal preparations of Tephrosia oligophylla include infusions, decoctions, and extracts that can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
